name: Microsoft Solitaire Collection

startup_sequence.note: Wait for app to fully load

klondike.rules: 7 tableau columns, 4 foundations (top right), stock (top left), waste pile. Build down alternating colors on tableau, build up by suit on foundations.
klondike.goal: Move all cards to foundations, Ace to King by suit.

how_to_navigate_to_klondike_and_start_ne.description: EXACT step-by-step UI flow learned from human demonstration. Follow these steps IN ORDER.
steps: 1. After the app opens, you see a game selection screen with tiles: Klondike, Spider, FreeCell, Pyramid, TriPeaks across the top.
2. Look at the screen and find the 'Klondike' tile. It's usually the FIRST tile on the LEFT. Click it.
3. If a previous game loads (you see cards on the board), you need to start a NEW game:
a. Look at the BOTTOM of the screen for a toolbar with buttons.
b. Find and click the 'New' button on the bottom toolbar.
c. A dialog appears asking 'End Game or Cancel'. Click the GOLD/YELLOW 'End Game' button.
d. A difficulty selection screen appears with Easy, Medium, Hard options.
e. Click 'Easy' (or whichever difficulty you want).
f. You may see a card back selection screen. Just click any card back design.
g. Look for a big 'PLAY' button and click it. The new game will start.
4. If no previous game exists, clicking Klondike goes straight to difficulty selection.
5. On the difficulty screen: click Easy, choose a card back, click PLAY.
6. The game board appears with 7 tableau columns, stock pile top-left, foundations top-right.

how_to_play_klondike.description: How to actually play the game once the board is visible.
steps: 1. SINGLE-CLICK any face-up card to auto-move it to the best valid position. The game figures out where it goes.
2. Move Aces to foundations immediately — single-click them and they go to the top-right foundation area.
3. After moving an Ace, the 2 of the same suit can also go up — single-click it.
4. Click through ALL face-up cards in the tableau to find any that can auto-move.
5. When no more tableau moves: click the stock pile (top-left deck) or press D to draw a new card.
6. Check the drawn card (waste pile, right of stock) — single-click it to play if possible.
7. Repeat: click all face-up cards, draw from stock, click all face-up cards again.
8. If stuck: press H for a hint — the game highlights the suggested card with a yellow glow.
9. Clicking a card in a stack moves the entire sub-stack together (e.g., clicking a 7 also moves the 6 on it).
10. When stock pile is empty, click the empty stock area to recycle/reshuffle drawn cards.

known_issues: The app opens the LAST game played — might be Spider, not Klondike. Always click Klondike tile first.
On the difficulty screen, there is a big PLAY button — you MUST click it after selecting difficulty.
DO NOT declare DONE unless you made 5+ real card moves on the actual game board.
If you see 'How to Play' screen, press the Back button (top-left) or Escape to return to the game.
strategy_for_agent: 1. Startup sequence handles launch, popups, and fullscreen.
2. Look at the screen. Follow 'how_to_navigate_to_klondike_and_start_new_game' steps exactly.
3. Click Klondike tile. If previous game loads, click New → End Game → Easy → PLAY.
4. If difficulty screen shows, click Easy, then click the big PLAY button.
5. Once the game board is visible with 7 columns of cards:
6. SINGLE-CLICK every face-up card to auto-move it. Start from left column to right.
7. When no cards move, press D to draw from stock, then click all face-up cards again.
8. Press H for hints if stuck.
9. NEVER look more than once in a row. Look → Act → Look → Act.
10. NEVER declare DONE until 5+ real card moves made on the actual game board.
